default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan a webinar demonstration showcasing AI agent capabilities for image-related tasks in content marketing and agency workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Primary use case: AI agent to embed relevant images into articles (15 articles/week, 14-18 images/article)](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Expanded focus: Demonstrate AI's ability to work with images for SaaS and agency-specific scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Timeline: Aiming for March 20th webinar; flexibility to adjust if needed for a more compelling presentation](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Action items: Miles to provide image dataset, team to create sample articles, explore additional use cases](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)

## Topics

### Current Client Use Case

  - [15 articles/week, translated to Spanish](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [14-18 images per article, mostly from Shutterstock](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Three different websites (locations) involved](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Image resizing and WebP conversion required](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)

### Proposed AI Agent Functionality

  - [Extract relevant photos based on specific article content](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
  - [Potential for automated image placement (e.g., every X lines)](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Workflow: AI agent column processes dataset of photos, outputs text with embedded image URLs](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Ability to batch process multiple articles quickly (e.g., 1000 articles in minutes)](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)

### Webinar Preparation

  - [Use publicly available dataset of royalty-free images](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Create sample articles to match the image set](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Consider including SaaS-specific use cases to align with Tiago's interests](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Possibility of showcasing multiple examples (e.g., general and SaaS-specific)](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)

### Potential Additional Use Cases

  - [Finding specific elements in images/charts/graphs (e.g., error messages in screenshots)](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Analyzing user recordings for UX/UI insights](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Agency-focused solutions: client reporting, data integration](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [Analytics synthesis across multiple tools and data sources](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Grading deliverables from contractors (e.g., assessing image quality and placement)](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)

### Webinar Theme and Structure

  - [Overarching theme: "How to use agents with images"](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Combine embedding images in articles with other image-related AI agent use cases](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Goal: Inspire audience with varied use cases and possibilities](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Miles to send publicly available image dataset to the team](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Team to create sample blog articles matching the provided images](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Miles to develop and test the demo based on the provided content](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Explore AI columns for grading UI screenshots and checking brand compliance](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
  - [Miles to record a Loom video showcasing the functionality](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Team to develop the webinar script](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [Kyle and Jimmy to brainstorm additional SaaS-level use cases](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Team to provide feedback and ideas within the week](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Miles to prioritize creating a proof of concept to match the team's energy](https://fathom.video/share/FDqtrGaivBYQBwPUHws6C9yvTJpxuMV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)

action_items.description: Send publicly available image dataset to Kyle/Mariana for demo prep
Create sample blog articles matching provided image dataset for demo
Test AI columns for grading UI screenshots & brand compliance checking
Record Loom video of PoC for image-based AI agent demo
Brainstorm w/ Jimmy on add'l SaaS-level use cases for image AI agents
Adapt current client work as inspiration for generic demo, collab w/ Mariana
